name: CRUD Stock Opname - Tambah, Isi Qty Aktual, Filter Gudang, Hapus
description: Test CRUD stock opname: buat opname baru, isi qty aktual barang, filter gudang, hapus. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
User is redirected to dashboard
Click Stock Opname menu in the sidebar
Stock Opname page is visible with list of opname sessions
Click the Buat Opname or Tambah Stock Opname button
Create stock opname form or modal is open
Select a warehouse from the gudang dropdown
Fill in the reference or notes if available, then click Simpan or Buat
New stock opname session appears in the table with Draft or Open status
Click on the opname session to open it or click the detail/edit button
Opname detail page or modal shows the list of products to count
Fill in the actual quantity (qty aktual) for at least one product
Click Simpan to save the actual quantities
Quantities are saved and the opname shows the difference or selisih
Go back to stock opname list and filter by gudang
Table is filtered showing opname for selected warehouse
Click Hapus on the draft opname that was created
Confirmation modal appears
Confirm deletion
Opname session is removed from the list
